title: AG75B Star Reflection Panchang and Nakshatra Integration Readiness
controlled_requirements_for_ag75b: Map DOB, birth-time mode, birth place, coordinates and timezone to the governed Panchang request basis.
Define which Panchang response fields may be consumed by Star Reflection.
Define Nakshatra identity, index, transition and availability handling without inventing missing values.
Define exact, unknown and invalid birth-time degradation paths.
Define runtime failure and unavailable-response handling.
Require no authentication secret in browser code.
Prohibit any database, deployment, runtime-flag or UI mutation inside AG75B contract creation.
